projects.title: ZZX-Labs.com
projects.blurb: Corporate and public-facing presence of ZZX-Labs, representing the parent organization, brand identity, partnerships, and external communications layer distinct from the R&D-focused zzx-labs.io infrastructure.

projects.title: ZZX-Labs.io
projects.blurb: Primary web presence of ZZX-Labs R&D, serving as the central hub for documentation, project indexing, research publications, and system-wide integration across all ZZX platforms.

projects.title: 0xdeadbeef.in
projects.blurb: Independent research archive for cybersecurity analysis, exploit archaeology, reverse engineering notes, and OSINT investigations authored under the 0xdeadbeef identity.

projects.title: 0xdeadbeefconsulting.io
projects.blurb: Applied security engineering and consulting platform offering incident response, threat analysis, system hardening, and adversarial infrastructure design.

projects.title: Bit-Tech.in
projects.blurb: Bitcoin-focused engineering and experimentation portal showcasing infrastructure components, protocol integrations, hardware systems, and applied research across the Bit* ecosystem.

projects.title: Bit-Tick.in
projects.blurb: Live deployment environment for Bit-Tick, providing production dashboards, real-time market data feeds, and public-facing Bitcoin analytics interfaces.

projects.title: Bit-Tick
projects.blurb: Global Bitcoin price intelligence interface delivering real-time ticker data, multi-exchange aggregation, charting, and holdings estimation aligned with BitAvg and portfolio analytics systems.

projects.title: CyberArmsBazaar.io
projects.blurb: Cyber tradecraft training and research environment focused on defensive security, red/blue team methodologies, tooling, and operational cyber capability development.

projects.title: ISN
projects.blurb: Internet Streaming Network — unified orchestration layer for distributed audio, video, and broadcast systems including ISAN, ISVN, ISRN, and ISTV. Provides channel routing, scheduling coordination, ingestion pipelines, and global stream distribution across the IS* ecosystem.

projects.title: ISAN
projects.blurb: Internet Streaming Audio Network — structured audio broadcast layer enabling music, voice, and data streams with channelization, scheduling, and distributed feed routing.

projects.title: ISRN
projects.blurb: Internet Streaming Radio Network — signal-oriented broadcast system focused on continuous radio-style transmission, station abstraction, frequency-style channel mapping, and long-duration streaming nodes.

projects.title: ISVN
projects.blurb: Internet Streaming Video Network — distributed video channel system supporting live streams, scheduled programming, archival playback, and decentralized ingestion pipelines for global video distribution.

projects.title: ISTV
projects.blurb: Internet Streaming Television — programmatic television layer built atop ISVN, supporting scheduled shows, episodic content, channel guides, and time-based broadcasting similar to traditional TV systems.

projects.title: Speciedex.org
projects.blurb: Public-facing portal for the Speciedex ecosystem, providing access to taxonomy datasets, research tools, species indexing systems, and global biological knowledge infrastructure.

projects.title: Speciedex
projects.blurb: Speciedex is a universal biological taxonomy and species indexing protocol defining the structure, encoding, and classification of life forms across hierarchical domains. It standardizes representation of species, subspecies, cultivars, genetic traits, habitats, and naming systems, enabling interoperable data exchange across SpeciedexCore, SpeciedexNet, and ecosystem applications. Analogous to Bitcoin as a protocol, Speciedex defines the rules, not the implementation.

projects.title: SpeciedexCore
projects.blurb: SpeciedexCore is the reference implementation of the Speciedex protocol, providing the core engine for taxonomy parsing, validation, indexing, and query execution. It manages structured species data, enforces protocol rules, and serves as the foundational backend for SpeciedexNet, SpeciedexExplorer, and related tools.

projects.title: SpeciedexExplorer
projects.blurb: Interactive web interface for navigating the Speciedex taxonomy graph, enabling exploration of biological classification, genetic traits, habitats, naming systems, and evolutionary relationships across all indexed species.

projects.title: SpeciedexNet
projects.blurb: SpeciedexNet is the distributed data and synchronization network powering the Speciedex ecosystem. It manages taxonomy graph storage, replication, validation, and exchange across nodes, enabling consistent global access to species data, genetic traits, habitats, and classification systems. Functions as the underlying data plane and protocol layer for SpeciedexExplorer, Speciedex.org, and related research systems.
